name: Meritor, Inc.
description: Meritor, Inc. is a leading global supplier of drivetrain, mobility, braking, and aftermarket solutions for commercial vehicle and industrial markets. Headquartered in Troy, Michigan, the company provides advanced engineering and high-quality components for trucks, trailers, military vehicles, and off-highway equipment. With a long-standing reputation for innovation and reliability, Meritor serves original equipment manufacturers and the aftermarket sector worldwide. The company was acquired by Cummins Inc. in 2022, further integrating its expertise into a broader portfolio of power and propulsion technologies for the global transportation industry.
